notes: Evals run 2026-04-28 (simulation). 3 scenarios: review-design (4/4=1.0), adr-assessment (4/4=1.0), pattern-check (3/4=0.75). Gap in pattern-check: Vue Router mode (history, not hash) is not in team-architect's checklist — it's in team-frontend SKILL.md but not cross-referenced here. Without_skill scores: review-design 0.5, adr-assessment 0.5, pattern-check 0.5 — general architecture review is a Claude capability but Conduction/Dutch-gov specifics require the skill.

runs.method: read-only Explore subagent simulation (no file writes)

assertions.note: Step 1 reads 4 shared specs; Steps 3-7 load 3 reference files (dutch-gov-architecture-standards.md, nlgov-api-design-rules.md, bio2-security-checklist.md).
Steps 2-7: 8 constraint categories with explicit checklists (layer, DI, events, frontend library, Dutch gov, NLGov API, data model, cross-app, security).
Step 1 reads change artifacts; Step 3 covers GEMMA/Common Ground/NLGov; Step 8 includes Dutch Government Standards table.
Step 8 template: 'Architectural Concerns' + 'Recommendations' sections + 'Approved Deviations' with justification.

runs.notes: Deep Dutch government standards coverage is the primary value: NORA/GEMMA, NLGov API 2.0, BIO2/NIS2, WCAG, AVG/GDPR — all with structured checklists.

Step 1 reads 4 shared specs; Steps 3-4 check against Dutch gov + NLGov API standards.

runs.notes: ADR assessment maps directly to the skill's Steps 1-8 flow. Cross-app impact table is a first-class output.

runs.method: read-only Explore subagent simulation (no file writes)
